title: Narrow filename with multiple unrelated responsibilities is flagged
text:
diff --git a/src/shop/auth.py b/src/shop/auth.py
--- a/src/shop/auth.py
+++ b/src/shop/auth.py
@@
+def create_invoice_for_user(user):
+    return Invoice(user.payment_method)
+
+def send_invoice_email(invoice):
+    email(invoice.customer_email)
+
+def migrate_billing_storage(db):
+    db.execute('alter table invoices add column status text')
intent: auth file に利用者認証補助を追加する。
rationale: A file named for auth should not silently absorb billing, notification, and persistence concerns without split, rename, or justification evidence.
